title: Install Kubernetes - Knowledge Check
description: Confirm you understand how the cluster was created.

questions.title: What did conjureCluster create?
questions.content: In Section 01 you ran conjureCluster to install Kubernetes. What does it start?

options.text: A local k3d (Kubernetes-in-Docker) cluster with ingress and k9s
A managed cloud Kubernetes cluster in AWS
options.explanation: The lab runs everything locally in the dev container.

questions.explanation: conjureCluster starts a local k3d cluster, wires ingress, and installs k9s.
hints: It runs entirely inside your dev container.

learningObjectives: Explain how the local Kubernetes cluster is provisioned.
